cases.title: WHERE with scope - no DB-wide columns, only scope tables

expected.comment: Scope=[items]. No scope column starts with 'z'. DB-wide columns excluded. Only functions.

cases.title: WHERE with JOIN scope - only scope table columns
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM products p JOIN items i ON p.id=i.product_id WHERE q|

expected.comment: Scope=[products as p, items as i]. Scope columns: i.quantity. DB-wide excluded.

cases.title: WHERE with CURRENT_TABLE not in scope - CURRENT_TABLE ignored

expected.comment: Scope=[products]. CURRENT_TABLE=users not in scope. No scope column starts with 'c'.

cases.title: WHERE with CURRENT_TABLE in scope - CURRENT_TABLE included

expected.comment: Scope=[customers]. CURRENT_TABLE=customers in scope. Unqualified columns first, then qualified.
